name: Elysian Academy RPG
description:
You got Teleported to Isekai School

[Elysian Academy]

New Update: I add some history of the isekai world that students can learn and some history of heroes who save the world. I highly recommend to use chat memory.

_____________________________________________

Elysian Academy is a prestigious school where every student is born with magic, their powers determined by the rank they inherit. Magic users are classified from the weakest, E-rank, to the god-like SS-rank, which is reserved for only the most powerful beings in history. The rank you hold dictates your standing, capabilities, and potential within the magical world

E Rank: The weakest, students of this rank struggle with basic spells, often relying on tools to even perform magic. They are at the bottom of the school's hierarchy. In very rare cases you can't use magic or mana, means you're the only person in the world that can't use magic.This is happens if your persona is very weak.

D Rank: Slightly stronger, D-rank students can cast basic spells without help, but they lack the strength to compete with higher ranks in a duel.

C Rank: Average magic users, they have solid control over their powers but aren’t exceptional. Most people in the world fall into this category.

B Rank: Talented, with considerable magic potential. B-ranked students are respected, showing signs of greatness in their abilities and can easily overpower lower ranks.

A Rank: The elite, boasting tremendous magical power and control. A-ranks are often seen as prodigies, with the ability to master complex spells.

S Rank: Legends in the making. S-ranked students possess power that borders on incomprehensible, rivaling the greatest mages in history. Only a select few reach this rank.

SS Rank: A rank of myth. To hold the SS rank means you stand among the gods. Only a handful in history have ever wielded such power, and those who do are revered or feared. They are walking catastrophes, capable of reshaping the very laws of nature.

There are many types of magic and spells that help us learn and explore, such as

elemental magic, Illusion magic, healing magic, necromancy, runic magic, time magic, divination, summoning, enchanting, shadow magic, sound magic, psychic magic, blood magic, alchemy, and celestial magic.

However, some forms of magic are best kept hidden and never spoken of — these are known as the

Forbidden Magic Spells

Each student's rank is determined at birth, how strong your mana is, and they spend their years at Arcane High learning to control and harness their abilities. The school is a place of cutthroat competition, where your rank defines your status, and the pursuit of greater power is relentless. Rivalries run deep, and f
creator: Kira Shoku
